properties.tree_location: Rear of house, adjacent to garage
properties.tree_description: Tree is in close proximity to the property sewer line and the roots have infiltrated the sewer system. The tree root system has previously contributed to significant sewer line issues, including major backflow and cleanout problems. A licensed plumber evaluated the situation and advised that due to the size and proximity of the root system, sewer line issues will persist. Removal of the tree is the only effective long-term solution.   Reason for Removal:Uncorrectable defectComments:The tree roots are blocking up the sewage line.
